source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A flow of nitrogen, 0.1 kg/s, comes out of a compressor stage at 500 kPa, 500 K and is now cooled to 310 K in a counterflowing intercooler by liquid water at 125 kPa, 15\circ\text{C} that leaves at 22\circ\text{C}. Find the total rate of entropy generation.

Find the total rate of entropy generation.
